title: BPSC Exam Calendar 2026
content:
BPSC Exam Calendar 2026

Post Date: February 3, 2026

2:02 pm

Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC, As per the latest official update, the Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the Exam Calendar for 2025–2026. It includes the schedule for various recruitment examinations such as Assistant Education Development Officer (AEDO), Assistant Town Planner (ATP) Special School Teacher (Classes 1-5 & Classes 6-8) Assistant Engineer (Civil / Mechanical / Electrical) Block Cooperative Officer Block Minority Welfare Officer Revenue Officer & Equivalent Labor Superintendent Senior Deputy Collector / Sub-Divisional Officer. Candidates planning to appear for these exams can now check their exam dates and download their admit cards.

BPSC Various Posts New Exam Calendar 2026 Bihar Public Service Commission

 

 How To Check & Download The BPSC Exam Calendar 2026 

  • Visit the Official BPSC Website:
    Go to bpsc.gov.in.

  • Go to the ‘Examinations’ Section:
    On the homepage, hover over the “Examinations” tab in the top menu.

  • Select ‘Calendar’:
    From the dropdown menu, click on “Calendar”.

  • Access the Annual Calendar 2026:
    On the Calendar page, find and click on the link titled “Annual Calendar 2026”.

  • Download the PDF:
    The BPSC Exam Calendar 2026 PDF will open. You can download or print it for your reference.

title: UPPSC Exam Calendar 2026
content:

6:36 pm

Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC), has released Exam Calendar on official website for the Examination of UPPSC Various Post 2026. The UPPSC Exam will be Conducted From 02 February 2026 To 20 December 2026. The UPPSC Exam Admit Card Released Soon. and can be checked through Enrollment number / Registration number / Date of birth by login into the portal. Which has given below.

 UPPSC Examination Conducted by the 
  • Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) organize exams regularly.

 

 UPPSC Exam Calendar 2026 
  • It is hereby informed that UPPSC Exam Calendar 2026 are out now & UPPSC Various Examination Schedule has released. Now, the candidates are advised to get themselves prepare for their examination so that they can improve their exam preparation candidates may also refers the UPPSC syllabus and the exam pattern once again.

 

 

 How To Check & Download UPPSC Exam Calendar 2026 

Steps to Check & Download:

  1. Visit the Official Website:
    Go to the Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) website: www.uppsc.up.nic.in.
  2. Search the Exam Calendar Link:
    • On the homepage, look for the “Exam Calendar 2026” link under the Information Bulletin or What’s New section.
  3. Open and View the Calendar:
    • Click on the link to open the exam calendar PDF.
    • Review the dates and schedule for various UPPSC exams.
  4. Download the PDF:
    • Click the Download button or save the PDF to your device for future reference.

title: SSC Exam Calendar 2026-27
content:
SSC Exam Calendar 2026-27

Post Date: January 8, 2026

8:15 pm

Staff Selection Commission (SSC), is one of the most prominent recruitment bodies in India, responsible for conducting exams like CGL, CSHL, MTS for various government jobs. SSC has released the notification calendar of upcoming exams which be help in year 2026-27. Details are mentioned below with date & other details. Candidates can access the SSC Calendar 2026-27 easily through the official SSC website.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

SSC Exam Calendar 2026-27

SSC Upcoming Exam Information 2026-27 : Short Details

SarkariResult.com.cm

  • Exam Date : May 2026 – March 2027
  • Admit Card Date : Before Exam
  • Result Date : Will Be Updated Here Soon.

Not Available.

Age Limit Details

Will Be Updated Here Soon.

Total Post

SSC Upcoming Exam Information 2026-27 : Recruitment Details
SSC Recruitment Name Notification Release Date Last Date Exam Date 2025-2026
JSA / LDC Grade Limited Departmental Competitive Exam 2025 (DoPT only) 16 March 2026 07 April 2026 May 2026
SSA / UDC Grade Limited Departmental Competitive Exam 2025 (DoPT only) 16 March 2026 07 April 2026 May 2026
ASO Grade Limited Departmental Competitive Exam 2025 16 March 2026 07 April 2026 May 2026
Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Examination 2026 March 2026 April 2026 May – June 2026
Junior Engineer (Civil, Mechanical & Electrical) Examination 2026 March 2026 April 2026 May – June 2026
Selection Post Examination Phase-XIV 2026 March 2026 April 2026 May – July 2026
Combined Higher Secondary (10+2) Level Examination 2026 April 2026 May 2026 July – September 2026
Stenographer Grade ‘C’ & ‘D’ Examination 2026 April 2026 May 2026 August – September 2026
Combined Hindi Translators Examination 2026 April 2026 May 2026 August – September 2026
Multi-Tasking Staff (Non-Technical) & Havaldar (CBIC & CBN) Exam 2026 June 2026 July 2026 September – November 2026
Sub-Inspector in Delhi Police & CAPFs Examination 2026 May 2026 June 2026 October – November 2026
Constable (GD) in CAPFs, NIA, SSF & Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles Exam 2027 September 2026 October 2026 January – March 2027

 

 How To Check & Download The SSC Exam Calendar 2026-2027 

Steps to Check and Download the SSC Calendar 2026:

    1. Visit the Official SSC Website:

        • Go to the official SSC website: ssc.nic.in.

    1. Navigate to the Latest News Section:

        • On the homepage, look for the “Latest News” or “Notices” section. The calendar is usually announced here.

    1. Check for SSC Calendar Notification:

        • Look for a notification titled “SSC Annual Calendar 2026” .

    1. Download the PDF:

        • Click on the notification link. It will open a PDF document with the detailed schedule for various SSC exams in 2025.

        • Click on the download icon or right-click and select “Save As” to download the calendar to your device.

    1. View Exam Dates:

        • Open the downloaded PDF to check the tentative dates for exams like SSC CGL, CHSL, MTS, GD Constable, and others.

SSC Exam Calendar 2026-2027 :  
  • Q1. What is the SSC Exam Calendar 2026-2027?
  • A: The SSC Exam Calendar 2026-2027 provides the schedule of exams conducted by the Staff Selection Commission (SSC) for various posts, including application start and end dates, examination dates, and result timelines.
  • Q3. What are the key exams listed in the SSC Exam Calendar 2026-2027?
  • A: The key exams include:
    • SSC Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Exam
    • SSC Combined Higher Secondary Level (CHSL) Exam
    • SSC Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) Exam
    • SSC Junior Engineer (JE) Exam
    • SSC Stenographer Grade C & D Exam
    • SSC GD Constable Exam
    • SSC Selection Posts
  • Q2. Where can I download the SSC Exam Calendar 2026-2027?
  • A: The SSC Exam Calendar can be downloaded from the official SSC website at ssc.nic.in.

title: RPSC Exam Calendar 2026
content:
RPSC Exam Calendar 2026

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:21 pm

Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC), has released the Tentative Exam Calendar on its official website for the Rajasthan Various Post Examination 2025. The exam will be conducted on 11 January 2026 To 27 December 2026, and the last date to submit the application form was 2025. Candidates can check their Exam Date / Exam Calendar using their Enrollment Number, Registration Number, or Date of Birth by logging into the portal. The direct link is provided below.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

RPSC Exam Calendar 2026

RPSC Various Post Examination 2026 : Short Details

SarkariResult.com.cm

Important Dates

  • Calendar Available Date : 26 December 2025
  • Exam Date : 11 January 2026 To 27 December 2026
  • Candidates are advised to confirm from the RPSC official website.

Application Fee

  • Visit Official Website
  • Payment Mode (Online): You can make the payment using the following methods:
    • Debit Card
    • Credit Card
    • Internet Banking
    • IMPS
    • Cash Card / Mobile Wallet

  • Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) organize exams regularly.

 

 

 How To Check & Download RPSC Exam Calendar 2026 
  • Visit the official website of Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC).
  • On the homepage, go to the “Examination Schedule / Exam Calendar / Notifications” section.
  • Look for the notification titled RPSC Exam Calendar 2026.
  • Click on the Exam Calendar notification.
  • The exam calendar will open in PDF format or as a notice.
  • Carefully check the dates of all exams, application periods, and important timelines mentioned in the calendar.
  • Download and save the exam calendar on your device.
  • Take a printout if you want a physical copy for planning.

 

 RPSC Various Post Recruitment 2026 : Mode Of Selection

  • Interview
  • Document Verification (DV)
  • Final Merit List

title: UP Police Recruitment Tentative Calendar 2025-26
content:
UP Police Recruitment Tentative Calendar 2025-26

Post Date: January 5, 2026

2:20 pm

Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board, has released the recruitment calendar for 2025–26, giving candidates clarity on exam dates, notifications, and vacancies. This step ends years of uncertainty and shows the government’s focus on timely recruitment. As per CM Yogi Aditya Nath’s promise, around 30,000 new police posts will be created to strengthen law and order in the state. UPPRPB has released the notification calendar of upcoming exams which be help in year 2025. Details are mentioned below with date & other details. Candidates can access the UP Police Recruitment Tentative Calendar 2025-26 easily through the official UP Police Official website.

 

 

 

Download SarkariResult App Now

UP Police Recruitment Calendar 2025-26

UP Police Upcoming Recruitment Information 2025 : Short Details

SarkariResult.com.cm

Important Dates

  • Calendar Released Date : 18 September 2025
  • Exam Date : Notify Soon
  • Admit Card Date : Before Exam
  • Result Date : Will Be Updated Here Soon.

Application Fee

Not Available.

Age Limit Details

Will Be Updated Here Soon.

Total Post
30,000+ Posts
Download SarkariResult App Now
UP Police Upcoming Exam Information 2025 : Recruitment Details
UP Police Recruitment Name Notification Release Date No. Of Post
Sub-Inspector (Civil Police, Platoon Commander, Armed Police, SSF) 12 August 2025 4,543
ASI (Clerk, Accounts) & SI (Confidential) 07 January 2024 / Exam Date : 02 Nov 2025 921
Computer Operator Grade-A 07 January 2024 / Exam Date : 01 Nov 2025 1,129
Assistant Radio Operator October – November 2025 44
Additional Computer Operator Grade-A October – November 2025 1,153
Constable (Civil, PAC, SSF, Jail Warder, Mounted, Women’s PAC) November 2025 22,605
Additional SI/ASI (Confidential & others) November 2025 345

 

 How To Check & Download UP Police Recruitment Calendar 2025-26 
  • Visit the Official Website
  • Go to the Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment & Promotion Board (UPPRPB) official portal.
  • Find the Recruitment Calendar Link
  • On the homepage, look for the notification “UP Police Recruitment Calendar 2025–26” under the latest updates/notice section.
  • Open the Calendar PDF
  • Click on the link, and the Recruitment Calendar PDF will open showing post-wise vacancy details, notification dates, and exam schedules.
  • Download the Calendar
  • Click on the Download option to save the PDF on your device.
  • Take a Printout (Optional)
  • Keep a hard copy of the calendar for quick reference during your exam preparation.

 

 UP Police Upcoming Exam Information 2025 : Application Process 
  • Online Registration
  • Visit the UPPRPB official website.
  • Click on the link for the desired UP Police recruitment post (Constable, SI, Jail Warder, Computer Operator, etc.).
  • Register with basic details like name, mobile number, and email ID.
  • Filling the Application Form
  • Log in with your registration credentials.
  • Fill in personal details, educational qualifications, and category information carefully.
  • Select your exam center preference (if option available).
  • Uploading Documents
  • Upload scanned copies of your passport-size photograph, signature, and other required documents in the prescribed format.
  • Payment of Application Fee
  • Pay the required application fee online using Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.
  • Final Submission
  • Review the form carefully before final submission.
  • Click on Submit and take a printout of the application form and fee receipt for future reference.

 

 UP Police Upcoming Exam Information 2025 : Mode Of Selection 
  • Online / Written Examination
  • Physical Measurement Test (PMT)
  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET)
  • Document Verification
  • Medical Examination
SOME USEFUL

UP Police Official Website
Click Here

 

 UP Police Recruitment Calendar 2025-26 :  
  • Q1. When was the UP Police Recruitment Calendar 2025–26 released?
  • A: The calendar has been officially released in 2025 by the UP Police Recruitment & Promotion Board (UPPRPB).
  • Q2. What details are included in the recruitment calendar?
  • A: It includes notification release dates, exam dates, number of vacancies, and posts to be filled.
  • Q3. How many vacancies are expected in UP Police recruitment 2025–26?
  • A: Around 30,000 new posts are planned across different categories like Constable, SI, Jail Warder, Computer Operator, and other posts.
  • Q4. Why is the recruitment calendar important for candidates?
  • A:  It provides clarity about exam schedules, helps in planning preparation, and removes confusion caused by delays.

 
  • Q5. What is the official website for UPPRPB?
  • A: The official website for UPPRPB is https://www.upprpb.in/#/auth/landing
